description: Show available slash commands
name: help

description: Show current session file and runtime details
name: session

description: List discovered agents, prompts, themes, and skills
name: resources

description: Log in to a subscription provider
name: login

description: Remove saved provider credentials
name: logout

description: Reload settings, extensions, skills, prompts, and themes
name: reload

description: mi runtime utilities
name: mi

description: Set the current thinking level
name: thinking

description: Read a file with optional offset and limit
name: read

description: Run a shell command in the current workspace
name: bash

description: Write a file, using -- to separate content
name: write

description: Replace exact text in a file
name: edit

description: Exit interactive mode
name: quit

description: Exit interactive mode
name: exit

description: Bump a package.json or Cargo.toml version, refresh lockfiles, commit, and push
name: bump

description: Same as /bump, but skips confirmation prompts and commits immediately
name: bump!

description: Stage all changes, generate a commit message, and commit locally
name: commit

description: Same as /commit, but skips confirmation prompts and commits immediately
name: commit!

description: Run /bump, then releasor2000 release when a releasor2000.toml exists
name: release

description: Same as /release, but skips confirmation prompts and runs immediately
name: release!

description: Save a global memory preference
name: remember

description: Delete a saved memory or candidate by text
name: forget

description: Show saved global memories
name: memories

description: Append to ./todo.txt, or choose a todo to start a new session
name: todo
